title: OpenStax Introduction to Philosophy
description: A source card for the OpenStax Introduction to Philosophy textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Introduction to Philosophy introduces logic, knowledge, reality, mind, ethics, political philosophy, aesthetics, and world philosophical traditions.
Use this source to support close reading, argument mapping, Socratic discussion, and comparisons between philosophical traditions.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
